purpose: Architectural overview of Synapse's built-in Git UI: multi-repository tabs, staging/unstaging, unified diffs, commit authoring, branch management, SVG commit graph, remote operations, quick actions for non-coders, and tiered safety dialogs. Covers state shape (GIT_* actions), 3-second status polling, security model (execFile only), and complete file structure (~8,800 lines).
gotchas: Status polls every 3 seconds while git view is active — disabled when hidden
Repo list persists to localStorage; live git data is always fetched fresh
Pushing to main/master triggers a protected-branch warning
patterns: Lane-based SVG branch graph with cubic bezier merges
